step2.title: How did you hear about We.Page?
step2.subtitle: We love to know how you found us

step3.title: What type of event is your invitation for?
step3.subtitle: Select the event type

step5.title: What would you like to quote?
step5.subtitle: You can select one option
step5.invitacion_digital: Digital invitation (save the date + PDF or web page)
step5.invitacion_digital_desc: Quote your complete invitation and you can add extras like Save the Date, sending or confirmations later.
step5.save_the_date_desc: Just the Save the Date, without a complete invitation.
step5.envio_invitaciones_desc: Just the sending service. Guest count will be requested.
step5.confirmaciones_desc: Just the confirmation service. Guest count will be requested.

step6_format.title: What format of digital invitation would you like?
step6_format.pagina_web_desc: A more dynamic digital invitation, with motion, photos and personalized sections. Ideal for events with many details or out-of-town guests.
step6_format.pdf_interactivo_desc: An elegant and direct invitation, similar to a physical invitation, but in digital version. Perfect for simpler or local events.

pdf.events_title: Does your event include more than one celebration or important moment?
pdf.events_multiple: Yes, I have several moments (e.g. civil, welcome party, after-party, etc.)
pdf.sub_events_title: Which of these events do you need to include?
pdf.guest_groups_title: Will all your guests attend all events?
pdf.guest_groups_desc: When there are different guests per event, more than one invitation or personalized versions may be required.
pdf.monogram_title: Would you like to include a monogram in your invitation?
pdf.monogram_desc: An elegant detail with your initials that gives identity to your entire event. It can also be used in stationery, dance floor, souvenirs and more.
pdf.monogram_yes: Yes, I would love to include a monogram
pdf.monogram_already: I already have my monogram / logo
pdf.illustrations_title: Would you like to add custom illustrations or graphic elements?
pdf.illustrations_desc: E.g. venue illustration, maps, unique event details, etc.
pdf.illustrations_yes: Yes, I would like something more special
pdf.gift_table_title: Gift registry: How would you like your guests to give you a gift?
pdf.gift_experiences_note: This service has an additional cost.
pdf.experiences_title: How complete would you like your experience table?
pdf.info_title: Would you like to include recommendations for your guests?
pdf.info_categories_title: What type of information would you like to include?
pdf.info_categories_desc: To maintain a clear and elegant invitation, we recommend including a limited number of options.
pdf.info_options_title: How many options would you like to include per category?
pdf.info_options_desc: Mentioned means only name, discount code or phone number and button to website are added.
pdf.personalized_title: Would you like to personalize your invitations with each guest's name?
pdf.personalized_desc: Each invitation will have the guest's information: their name and number of tickets, allowing better control and a personalized experience.
pdf.rsvp_title: Would you like to include an RSVP confirmation form in your invitation?
pdf.rsvp_desc_1: Your guests will be able to confirm their attendance directly from the invitation and answer general questions.
pdf.rsvp_desc_2: This form is the same for all guests and works as a registration tool.
pdf.rsvp_desc_3: It does not include sending reminders or tracking confirmations.
pdf.sending_title: Would you like us to handle sending your invitations?
pdf.sending_desc: We send your invitation via WhatsApp to each of your guests, with their assigned ticket numbers, facilitating organization and avoiding errors.
pdf.sending_note: 💡 This service has an additional cost per person.
pdf.confirmation_title: Would you like us to handle attendance confirmation for your guests?
pdf.confirmation_desc: We take care of contacting your guests via WhatsApp to confirm their attendance and send reminders.
pdf.confirmation_note: 💡 This service has an additional cost per guest.
pdf.guest_count_title: How many contacts (phone numbers) will we send the invitation to?
pdf.guest_count_tip: 💡 Keep in mind that normally an invitation is sent per family or couple, not per person.
pdf.extras_title: Would you like to add anything else to your invitation?
pdf.extras_subtitle: You can select more than one option

web.events_title: How many moments or events would you like to include in your page?
web.events_desc: E.g. civil, ceremony, welcome, after-party, etc.
web.pages_title: Would you like all events on the same page or separate?
web.pages_separate: Separate some events on additional pages
web.domain_title: How would you like your page domain?
web.design_title: How would you like your page to look?
web.design_photos_desc: We use your photographs to design the invitation.
web.design_graphic_desc: We create the invitation with illustrations, textures and visual elements.
web.design_mixed_desc: We combine photos with graphic elements.
web.special_title: Would you like to include special elements in your page?
web.special_desc: E.g. specific venue illustrations, personalized details, unique event elements, etc.
web.special_yes: Yes, I would like something more special
web.extras_title: Extras: You can add additional features
web.extras_desc: All extras have an additional cost
web.extra_bilingue_desc: Translate your invitation to another language. Translation must be provided by the client.
web.extra_password_desc: Protect your invitation with a password for more privacy.
web.extra_clima_desc: Show the weather at the venue on the day of the event.

std.format_title: What format would you like for your Save the Date?
std.format_basico_desc: Includes only the essentials: names, date and venue. Ideal if you're looking for something clean.
std.format_extendido_desc: Includes the essentials + a second page with recommendations (e.g. accommodation). Ideal for providing more context.
std.design_title: How would you like it to look?
std.sending_title: Would you like us to handle sending your Save the Date?
std.sending_desc: We send your Save the Date via WhatsApp to each of your guests.
std.sending_note: 💡 This service has an additional cost per person.

send.title: Invitation Sending
send.guest_count_title: How many contacts (phone numbers) will we send the invitation to?

confirm.title: Attendance Confirmation
confirm.guest_count_title: How many contacts (phone numbers) will we send the confirmation to?

thank_you.title: Thank you!
thank_you.subtitle: Based on your answers, we will prepare a personalized proposal for you.
thank_you.message: You will receive your quotation via WhatsApp.
thank_you.note: If you don't receive it within 3 business days, please contact our team.
